leadText: Melee redirects here. For the game that was known in Japanese as "Melee! Pokémon Scramble", see Pokémon Rumble Super Smash Bros. Melee (Japanese: 大乱闘スマッシュブラザーズＤＸ Great Fray Smash Brothers DX) is a fighting game for the Nintendo GameCube and the sequel to the Nintendo 64 title Super Smash Bros. It, like its predecessor, pits Nintendo's many mascots against one another, and this time includes four Pokémon as playable characters, as opposed to the two featured in the previous game. Only Pikachu is available at the start, but eventually Jigglypuff, Pichu, and Mewtwo can be unlocked.

sections.title: Playable characters
sections.text: Playable characters [ edit | edit source ] Bold denotes a Pokémon character. Italics denotes a newcomer. Default [ edit | edit source ] Mario Bowser Peach Yoshi Donkey Kong Captain Falcon Fox Ness Ice Climbers Kirby Samus Zelda / Sheik Link Pikachu Unlockable characters [ edit | edit source ] Dr. Mario Luigi Ganondorf Falco Young Link Jigglypuff Mewtwo Pichu Mr. Game & Watch Marth Roy
